questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.hint: Multiply 10 by 5 and 6 by 5, then add.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.explanation: 24 ÷ 8 = 3. Bring along the zero to make 30.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: A bakery makes 6 boxes of cookies. Each box holds 6 cookies. How many cookies are there in total?
questions.hint: This is a perfect square multiplication rule.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: You go shopping with a $50 bill and buy a pair of shoes for $35. How much change do you receive?

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.hint: Align the decimal points before adding.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: Subtract 7/10 - 2/10. Write your answer as a fraction.
questions.explanation: 7 - 2 = 5. Keep the denominator 10. The result is 5/10.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: What type of angle measures exactly 90 degrees?
questions.explanation: An angle of exactly 90 degrees is called a right angle.

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: What is the area of a rectangle that has a length of 11 cm and a width of 3 cm?

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.q: How many milliliters are in 1 liter?
questions.explanation: There are 1,000 milliliters in a full liter.
